## Checklist

<!-- Check all items before requesting review -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated API documentation (if applicable)

### Security
- [ ] I have not exposed any secrets or credentials
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes
- [ ] New dependencies have been reviewed for vulnerabilities

### Database (if applicable)
- [ ] Migration files are included
- [ ] Migration is reversible
- [ ] Data migration tested on staging data

### Deployment
- [ ] Changes are backwards compatible
- [ ] Feature flags used for risky changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Environment variables documented
